nodes.name: Crithagra
nodes.summary: Crithagra（Crithagra）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联38种鸟类，如White-rumped seedeater、黃額絲雀、African citril等38种鸟类。

nodes.name: Western citril
nodes.summary: Western citril（Crithagra frontalis）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Western citril。

nodes.name: Western citril
nodes.summary: The western citril (Crithagra frontalis), also known as the yellow-browed citril, is a species of finch in the family Fringillidae. It is found in central Africa. The western citril was formerly placed in the genus Serinus but phylogenetic analysis using mitochondrial and nuclear DNA sequences found that the genus was polyphyletic. The genus was therefore split and a number of species including the western citril were moved to the resurrected genus Crithagra. References
